_comment: Digital Asset Links — proves the TWA owns this domain so the Android client runs full-screen with no browser chrome. Owner replaces sha256_cert_fingerprints[0] with the SHA-256 fingerprint emitted by 'bubblewrap build' (also visible via 'keytool -list -v -keystore android.keystore'), then redeploys. Procedure: docs/play-store.md §Asset Links.
